steps.title: Find the contrast signal
steps.content: The passage says Primary took a different approach, which signals a contrast with the earlier idea that some bands pick unique names to stand out.

steps.title: Apply the contrast transition
steps.content: The word “by contrast,” directly shows that Primary’s method opposes the usual strategy described before. The other three either show cause‑and‑effect, give an example, or add a point — none express the needed contrast. That matches choice B — B is correct.
